Lect. Ahmet Mustafa ZEKİ completed his undergraduate education in Arabic Language and Literature and Islamic Studies at the Faculty of Dār al-ʿUlūm, Cairo University. He subsequently undertook pedagogical formation training at the Graduate School of Education of the same university.

He obtained his master’s degree in Teaching Arabic to Non-Native Speakers from Istanbul Aydın University and is currently pursuing his doctoral studies in Arabic Language and Balāgha at the Faculty of Islamic Sciences, Karabük University.

Since 2008, he has been engaged in teaching Arabic to non-native speakers. Since 2015, he has been serving as a Lecturer in Arabic Language at Istanbul 29 Mayıs University, and as a Board Member of the International Arabic Center for Education Implementation and Research (ARÖMER).

He is also the author of the book “Let’s Learn Arabic”, which has been specifically designed for learners of Arabic as a foreign language.
